name: testDeleteAcquirer
description: Verify that an acquirer can be deleted
descriptionHtml: Verify that an acquirer can be deleted

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that an acquirer can be deleted

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: a success message appears after deleting the acquirer
Verify: the deleted acquirer is no longer present in the dropdown list
Select '0628.153227 acquirer 11.002.01' acquirer using filter
